'''Jiroch-Reslia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Tunroth]], a relatively primitive [[Species/Legends|species]] of hunters.

==History==
Jiroch-Reslia joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in around [[9000 BBY]]. The Tunroth settled two other planets in their [[Star system/Legends|star system]], [[Jiroch-Kalok|Kalok]] and [[Jiroch-Saloch]], forming a system government known as the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]]. Despite this, their technology and weaponry remained largely traditional.

Around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], the planet was invaded by the [[Lortan Fanatics]] during the [[Reslian Purge]]. Millions of Tunroth lives were lost and the species was only saved from [[Speciecide|annihilation]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] military intervention. Numerous [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] units, including the [[37th Imperial Fighter Wing]] and the [[291st Legion/Legends|291st Legion Dalisor]] of the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]], fought on the planet.

The Imperial intervention ensured Jiroch-Reslia's loyalty to the Empire, but it did join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in later years.
